## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` when the change affects product behavior, architecture, or operations.
- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] I documented any new environment variables in `.env.example`.
- [ ] I added or updated SQL migrations if the schema changed.
- [ ] I reviewed permission and audit implications if the change touches domain data.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` or `CONTRIBUTING.md` if the workflow/setup changed.
